about: Propose a new component, builder, or capability
labels: enhancement

ComposureCDK is pre-release (0.x) and its architecture is still stabilising, so
we work issue-first: please open this before sending a large PR, so we can agree
on fit and approach. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

**Problem / use case**

<!-- What are you trying to do? What's the friction with the current API? -->

**Proposed solution**

<!-- What would the builder / compose usage look like? A sketch is fine. -->

**Alternatives considered**

<!-- Other approaches, workarounds, or prior art (CDK constructs, other libs). -->
